evals.prompt: Generate FIG. 2 for my medical device patent — the tier progression diagram showing the 5 clearance levels from UNCLASSIFIED up to CERTIFIED. The provisional is at ~/patents/PROVISIONAL-MEDICAL-DEVICE.md
evals.expected_output: A USPTO-style patent figure image (PATENT-FIG2-V1-*.jpg) saved to ~/Downloads, showing a tier progression diagram with 5 clearance levels (UNCLASSIFIED, BASIC, STANDARD, ENHANCED, CERTIFIED), reference numerals, correct line weights, SHEET N OF N header, FIG. 2 caption, no icons, no fills, all-caps block letters.

evals.prompt: I need FIG. 3 for the network protocol patent — the connection state machine. File is ~/patents/PROVISIONAL-NETWORK-PROTOCOL.md
evals.expected_output: A USPTO-style patent figure image (PATENT-FIG3-V1-*.jpg) saved to ~/Downloads, showing a state machine with IDLE, CONNECTING, ACTIVE, and TIMEOUT states, transitions labeled with trigger conditions, reference numerals, FIG. 3 caption, no icons, strict monochrome line art.

evals.prompt: Generate FIG. 1 for the logistics coordination patent at ~/patents/PROVISIONAL-LOGISTICS.md — the system architecture showing multiple dispatch agents routing to a central coordinator.
evals.expected_output: A USPTO-style patent figure image (PATENT-FIG1-V1-*.jpg) saved to ~/Downloads, showing multiple DISPATCH AGENT boxes connected to a central COORDINATOR box, reference numerals, correct arrows, FIG. 1 caption, SHEET 1 OF N header.
